note: Per-race withdrawals: an athlete confirmed OUT of ONE race (they stay in their OTHER races, unlike athleteBlocklist which hides them everywhere). Applied at the athlete-data MERGE, AFTER the weekly ingest — so the cron cannot re-add the dropped start. Match = athlete id + date (+ optional 'race' substring matched against the event name). Ids are name slugs, e.g. "laura-philipp". Verify every entry against a real source before adding; never guess a withdrawal.

withdrawn.reason: Defending champion out of DATEV Challenge Roth 2026, health reasons. Verified tri-mag.de / TRI247 / tri2b.com, 2026-07-01.
